sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32060" key="e)kqu/simos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκ-θύσιμος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n32060.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">needing atonement,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.518b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
